$schema: https://wInstaller local design tokens - machine-readable extension of DESIGN_SYSTEM.md
description: Product-specific accent colors and spacing/radius scale shared across macOS (SwiftUI), Windows (WinUI3), and Linux (GTK4/libadwaita) UIs. Each platform still uses its native materials/system colors as the base - these tokens only pin the small set of product-specific values that must not drift.

accent.role: Sapphire blue - USB connector glyph and primary progress
accent.note: Prefer platform accentColor where the OS defines one; this is the fallback/base.

destructive.role: System red - destructive and blocking errors

radius.note: Prefer native control radii where the platform provides its own shape; 8px is the ceiling for repeated cards/panels.
